name: Percentage Calculator
description: Industrial-grade percentage calculator for process yield, defect rate, and efficiency analysis, compliant with ISO 9001, Lean, and Six Sigma standards.

inputs.label: Total Units Produced
inputs.businessContext: Total number of units produced in the reporting period (ISO 9001:2015 clause 9.1.3).

inputs.label: Defective Units
inputs.businessContext: Number of units failing quality inspection (Six Sigma DPMO metric).

inputs.label: Rework Units
inputs.businessContext: Units that required rework to meet specifications (Lean waste reduction).

inputs.label: Scrap Units
inputs.businessContext: Units that are scrapped and cannot be reworked (material yield loss).

inputs.label: Target Yield (%)
inputs.businessContext: Desired first-pass yield percentage (Six Sigma target ≥ 99.99966% for 6σ).

inputs.label: Process Type
inputs.businessContext: Type of process for contextual benchmarking (WERC DC metrics, ISO 9001).

inputs.label: Include Scrap in Defect Count
inputs.businessContext: If true, scrap units are counted as defective for defect rate calculation.

rules.message: Defective units cannot exceed total units.
Rework units cannot exceed total units.
Scrap units cannot exceed total units.
Sum of defective and rework units cannot exceed total units.
Target yield must be between 0 and 100.

thresholds.message: First-pass yield is below 95% – investigate process stability.
First-pass yield below 80% – immediate corrective action required (ISO 9001:2015 clause 10.2).
Scrap rate exceeds 5% – review material and process parameters.
Rework rate above 10% – consider root cause analysis (Lean).

formulas.label: Effective Defects
formulas.description: Total defects including scrap if selected.

formulas.label: Defect Rate (%)
formulas.description: Percentage of units that are defective (DPMO basis).

formulas.label: First-Pass Yield (%)
formulas.description: Percentage of units produced without any defect or rework (Six Sigma FTY).

formulas.label: Yield Gap (percentage points)
formulas.description: Difference between target yield and actual first-pass yield.

formulas.label: OEE Impact (%)
formulas.description: Estimated impact on Overall Equipment Effectiveness due to defects and rework (ISO 22400).

primary.label: First-Pass Yield (%)
primary.description: Primary metric for process quality performance.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Excessive Rework
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Rework rate above 10% indicates process instability or inadequate training.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: High Scrap
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Scrap rate above 5% suggests material or process parameter issues.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Yield Gap Positive
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Actual yield below target indicates need for process improvement.

suggestedActions.label: Reduce Defects
suggestedActions.description: Implement SPC (Statistical Process Control) to monitor and reduce defect rate.

suggestedActions.label: Minimize Rework
suggestedActions.description: Conduct root cause analysis (5 Whys, Fishbone) for rework drivers.

suggestedActions.label: Scrap Reduction
suggestedActions.description: Review material specifications and process parameters to lower scrap.

suggestedActions.label: Align to Target Yield
suggestedActions.description: Set incremental improvement goals to close yield gap (Kaizen).

dataConfidenceAdjusted.label: Data Confidence Adjusted Yield
dataConfidenceAdjusted.description: First-pass yield adjusted for data completeness and measurement system accuracy (ISO 10012).
